name: Lottie Web (After Effects Animations)

performance.notes: SVG/Canvas/HTML rendering; lightweight JSON animations; GPU Canvas renderer for complex animations

agent_readiness.notes: Render Adobe After Effects animations exported as JSON (Bodymovin plugin). Cross-platform: Web, iOS (lottie-ios), Android (lottie-android). SVG, Canvas, and HTML renderers. Play, pause, stop, setSpeed, setDirection controls. Segment playback. LottieFiles.com community with free animations. React (react-lottie), Vue, and Angular wrappers. Used by Airbnb, Google, Netflix for micro-interactions. JSON animations are tiny compared to GIF/video.

gotchas: Complex AE features may not export correctly (feature parity gaps)
Bodymovin AE plugin required for export workflow
SVG renderer has performance limits for complex animations
Interactive programmatic animation is limited vs CSS/GSAP
best_when: Micro-interactions and UI animations designed by motion designers
Cross-platform animation (web + iOS + Android same JSON)
Loading screens, empty states, success/error animations
Marketing animations replacing heavy GIF/video files
avoid_when: Complex programmatic animations (use GSAP or CSS animations)
Teams without After Effects workflow or LottieFiles library access
summary: Lottie Web renders Adobe After Effects animations exported as JSON (Bodymovin plugin) on web, iOS, and Android. Tiny JSON files vs GIF/video. SVG, Canvas, HTML renderers. Programmatic controls (play/pause/speed/direction). LottieFiles community library of free animations. Used by Airbnb and Google for product micro-interactions. Best for polished UI animations by motion designers without web animation expertise.
